tweets.author: Quantumup1
tweets.text: BTIG reiterated $SYRE Buy-$70 after $RPRX announced a co-funding agreement w/ $JNJ for the devt of JNJ-4804 (co-antibody of  remfya+golimumab [IL-23+TNF]). BTIG said—We believe this is a meaningful positive catalyst for SYRE's combination approaches (SPY120/130/230) in IBD.  JNJ's expected presentation of DUET data at some point later this year and a potential progression to Phase 3 could read through positively to SYRE's platform approach to combination regimens in IBD.  SYRE's Phase 2 platform
